en: Whenever they try to shut me and cut me down
I won't be silenced you can't keep me
quiet I won't tremble when you try it all I know is I won't
when they try to suffocate me don't you underestimate me
Cause I know that I won't go speechless Healing stone
every rule every word centuries old and unbending
Staking your place better seen and not heard and now that story is
ending Cause I I cannot start to crumble So
